requirements: Precision attitude control via momentum exchange (0.005-0.05 Nms)
Vibration isolation to prevent jitter transfer to EO payload
Thermal management of motor stator heat through conduction/convection ribs
Secure harness routing for 3-phase BLDC and Hall sensor signals

verify.value: All ribs and bosses are vertical/radial (0°-85°)
CNC machined from solid billet; no overhang issues.
±0.01mm on bearing_seat_datum via precision boring bar.

risk.desc: High-speed rotor imbalance causing jitter transfer to CubeSat bus.
risk.mit: Dynamic balancing of reaction_wheel_mass_rotor and precision CMM verification of bearing_seat_datum runout.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion mismatch between motor stator and Al 7075 housing affecting sensor alignment.
risk.mit: Use thermal interface material (TIM) in the magnetorquer_compensation_element gap and implement active temperature monitoring via hall_effect_inspection_port access.

risk.desc: Harness chafing within harness_routing_channel due to high-frequency vibration.

risk.desc: Vacuum outgassing from residual machining oils in sensor_access_window.
risk.mit: Strict ultrasonic cleaning and vacuum bake-out protocol post-anodizing.

manufacturing_strategy.process_basis: CNC milling for high-precision bearing seats; Anodizing (Type II) to prevent vacuum outgassing and provide thermal emissivity.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion mismatch between Al 7075 frame and PCB stack causing stress on standoffs.

risk.desc: Surface roughness of internal harness channels causing cable abrasion during vibration.

internal_features.function: Internal light suppression baffles mounting points

integration_opportunities: merge mounts, routing channels, ribs, labels, and service datums into the printed subsystem where inspection still remains possible

manufacturing_strategy.process_basis: CNC Milling (Al 7075) for primary structure; Anodizing for thermal control and surface finish.
manufacturing_strategy.datum_strategy: Primary datum on the main optical axis [X, Y] and mounting flange plane [Z].
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance_strategy: Sub-micron alignment tolerance required for lens mount bosses (H7/g6 fits).
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Vertical orientation to minimize tool access issues in deep baffle grooves.
manufacturing_strategy.inspection_strategy: CMM verification of optical axis parallelism and surface roughness on radiator face.

verification_focus: Verify lens mount boss co-axiality via CMM
Thermal vacuum (TVAC) testing to validate thermal strap efficiency,
Vibration testing to ensure no structural resonance in optical path
Visual inspection of baffle alignment and light leak paths.

generated_parts.label: Cold Gas Thruster × 4
generated_parts.spec: Cold gas propulsion thruster bracket, 4 thrusters cross-pattern, 50mN class, plumbing manifold

requirements: Provide structural mounting for 4x cold gas thrusters in a cross-pattern within 3U CubeSat volume.
Maintain internal manifold pressure containment and equalized distribution to all nozzles.
Ensure precise nozzle orientation (parallelism < 0.5 deg) and provide service access/harness routing.

cad_brief.name: Cold Gas Thruster Bracket & Manifold Assembly

verify.value: Self-supporting internal radii used in plenum

risk.desc: Internal manifold surface roughness from DED may cause high pressure drop and turbulent flow.
risk.mit: Post-process internal channels via abrasive flow machining (AFM).

risk.desc: Residual stress in Al 7075 during DED may cause warping of the mounting datum plane.
risk.mit: Implement controlled thermal gradient deposition and post-build stress relief annealing.

risk.desc: Porosity in thin wall sections (2.5mm) may compromise pressure containment of propellant.
risk.mit: Perform X-ray CT inspection on all manifold plenum walls post-build.

risk.desc: DED surface finish insufficient for O-ring seal lands at thruster interfaces.
risk.mit: CNC machine the flange faces and seal lands after DED build to achieve H7 fit.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion mismatch between Al 7075 bracket and CFRP CubeSat frame.
risk.mit: Incorporate flexural mounts or thermal isolation washers at p1 interface.

blueprint._part_spec: Cold gas propulsion thruster bracket, 4 thrusters cross-pattern, 50mN class, plumbing manifold

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Structural mounting and fluid distribution manifold for 4x cold gas thrusters in a cross-pattern, providing high-pressure containment and precise nozzle orientation within the CubeSat chassis.

physics_paths.path: Thruster impulse -> Thruster flange -> Bracket ribs -> Primary Structure (p1) mounting rails
physics_paths.design_implication: Requires stiffened rib architecture and high-strength Al 7075 baseplate to prevent structural deflection during firing.

physics_paths.path: High-pressure gas -> Manifold plenum -> Branch channels -> Thruster injector faces
physics_paths.design_implication: Requires internal manifolded channels with smooth radii and seal lands for O-ring or metal-to-metal interfaces.

physics_paths.path: Nozzle heat soak -> Bracket conduction path -> Thermal isolation interface to p1
physics_paths.design_implication: Integration of thermal breaks/insulation zones between thruster mounting points and the primary bus.

adjacent_interfaces.required_feature: 4x M3 fastener pattern on datum-aligned mounting pads
Bulkhead pass-through for propellant lines and electrical solenoid leads
Concentric seal lands for thruster nozzle interfaces

internal_features.name: Main Manifold Plenum
internal_features.function: Central gas reservoir for equalized pressure to all 4 thrusters
internal_features.geometry_hint: Large central cylindrical cavity with internal branching channels

internal_features.name: Thruster Mounting Flanges
internal_features.function: Secure attachment points for the 4 thrusters in cross pattern
internal_features.geometry_hint: Circular bolt patterns with raised bosses and seal lands

internal_features.name: Structural Reinforcement Ribs
internal_features.function: Distribute impulse loads and prevent plate buckling
internal_features.geometry_hint: Radial ribs connecting flanges to the baseplate perimeter

internal_features.name: Propellant Inlet Port
internal_features.function: Connection point for the main propellant supply line
internal_features.geometry_hint: Tapped hole with internal shoulder/seal land

internal_features.name: Harness Channel
internal_features.function: Route for solenoid valve wiring and sensor leads
internal_features.geometry_hint: Recessed rectangular channel in the bracket base

internal_features.name: Inspection Window/Port
internal_features.function: Visual access to valve status or leak detection point
internal_features.geometry_hint: Recessed pocket with clearance for optical inspection

integration_opportunities: merge mounts, routing channels, ribs, labels, and service datums into the printed subsystem where inspection still remains possible

manufacturing_strategy.process_basis: 5-axis CNC machining from Al 7075 billet for high strength and pressure containment.
manufacturing_strategy.datum_strategy: Primary datum on the bottom mounting face (Z=0) and four corner alignment pins.
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance_strategy: H7/g6 fit for thruster interface seal lands; +/- 0.02mm on nozzle axis parallelism.
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Machined with baseplate flat on fixture to minimize setup error.
manufacturing_strategy.inspection_strategy: Pressure decay testing of manifold, borescope inspection of internal channels.

verification_focus: Manifold pressure containment vs. burst rating
Nozzle alignment parallelism (angular deviation < 0.5 deg)
Structural stiffness under max impulse load
Leakage rate at all fluid interfaces

generated_parts.label: Separation Spring Plate
generated_parts.spec: P-POD or ISIPOD separation interface plate, spring pusher contact, kill switch arm

requirements: Mechanical separation interface for P-POD/ISIPOD deployer compatibility
Reliable spring pusher contact pad for deployment impulse transmission
Electrical kill switch mechanism for satellite power isolation during launch
Compliance with CubeSat Design Specification (CDS) rail tolerances
High stiffness to withstand 10g+ separation shock without buckling

verify.value: CNC milling approach avoids overhang issues via vertical tool access.

risk.desc: Contact pad surface deformation during high-impulse deployment.
risk.mit: Specify Al 7075-T6 hardening and CMM verification of flatness post-machining.

risk.desc: Electrical shorting in kill switch due to vibration/g-load.
risk.mit: Implement redundant insulation on the pivot arm and verify contact gap clearance.

risk.desc: Jamming of deployment rails due to thermal expansion mismatch.
risk.mit: Include specified 2mm longitudinal slot for axial movement/clearance.

blueprint._part_spec: P-POD or ISIPOD separation interface plate, spring pusher contact, kill switch arm

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Mechanical separation interface between the launch vehicle deployer (P-POD/ISIPOD) and the 3U CubeSat primary structure, managing deployment force transmission and electrical disconnect.

physics_paths.path: Spring pusher contact -> Spring Plate Body -> Mounting Rails -> Primary Structure (p1)
physics_paths.design_implication: High-stiffness Al 7075 plate with integrated ribs to prevent buckling during deployment impulse.

physics_paths.path: Kill switch arm -> Deployment sensor/switch -> Avionics (p1)
physics_paths.design_implication: Precision-machined pivot axis and contact pads for reliable electrical isolation upon separation.

physics_paths.path: Conduction through mounting rails to primary structure
physics_paths.design_implication: Thermal standoff/insulation zone between the plate and satellite chassis to prevent heat soak from deployer mechanism.

adjacent_interfaces.required_feature: Longitudinal rail guide interface and fastener pattern
Spring pusher contact pad and shear pin holes
Kill switch terminal contact and harness channel

internal_features.name: Main Separation Plate Shell
internal_features.function: Primary load-bearing substrate for deployment forces
internal_features.geometry_hint: shell 90x90x3mm with chamfered edges

internal_features.name: Spring Pusher Contact Pad
internal_features.function: Interface for deployer spring force transmission
internal_features.geometry_hint: cylindrical boss 15mm dia, 4mm height

internal_features.name: Kill Switch Pivot Axis
internal_features.function: Rotation axis for the electrical disconnect arm
internal_features.geometry_hint: drill 2mm dia through-hole with bushing seat

internal_features.name: Deployment Rail Interface Zone
internal_features.function: Sliding interface for CubeSat rails to prevent jamming
internal_features.geometry_hint: longitudinal slot 2mm x 10mm along Y-axis

internal_features.name: Wire Harness Routing Channel
internal_features.function: Protects electrical leads for kill switch and sensors
internal_features.geometry_hint: recessed channel 12x4mm depth 2mm

internal_features.name: Structural Stiffeners
internal_features.function: Increase bending stiffness without significant mass penalty
internal_features.geometry_hint: patterned ribs 1.5mm thick in X-direction

internal_features.name: Primary Structure Fastener Bosses
internal_features.function: Secure plate to 3U primary frame (p1)
internal_features.geometry_hint: 4x M3 clearance holes at corners

integration_opportunities: merge mounts, routing channels, ribs, labels, and service datums into the printed subsystem where inspection still remains possible

manufacturing_strategy.process_basis: CNC Milling (Al 7075-T6) for high precision and surface finish on contact interfaces.
manufacturing_strategy.datum_strategy: Planar datum established by the two primary mounting faces; X/Y axes aligned to CubeSat rail orientation.
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance_strategy: Tight tolerance (±0.02mm) on spring pusher pad flatness and kill switch pivot axis parallelism.
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Flat machining on XY plane; vertical features machined in single setup where possible.
manufacturing_strategy.inspection_strategy: CMM verification of rail slot parallelism and contact pad planarity.

verification_focus: Deployment impulse load path continuity
Kill switch electrical separation reliability under vibration
Rail interface clearance to prevent deployment jam (CDS compliance)
